positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a mythical mountain range blending into a nebula sky. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, featuring stark, clean silhouettes of jagged peaks dominating the foreground. Above the peaks, incorporate geometric shapes representing constellations and flowing cosmic dust streams. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and minimalist vector art, rendered with flat colors, limited palette of deep indigo, turquoise, gold foil accents, and charcoal black. Emphasize clean lines, negative space, and a strong, graphic 'sticker' or emblem feel. Full body print orientation, suitable for merchandise and apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, signature, watermark, low detail, writing, text, logo, trademark, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, photorealism
